base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of shop_npcs_and_signs — a character from 1987 final fantasy. Shop-keeper NPCs (weapon/armor/item/white-magic/black-magic/inn/clinic) + shop-sign icons. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
